name: Conversational AI agent with web search
description: A multi-turn conversational AI agent. Takes a user question, performs Exa web search for real-time context, uses Claude to generate a thoughtful conversational response, and delivers the answer to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: AI: conversational agent with custom tool written in JavaScript

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the response

conversationHistory.description: Previous conversation context (optional, for multi-turn conversations)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for the conversation

personality.description: Agent personality (e.g. 'helpful and friendly', 'technical expert', 'creative writer')

steps.name: Search the web for relevant context via Exa
Run Claude AI for conversational response
Build Slack Block Kit conversational message
